surveyframe TODO

Source: todo.md

This checklist is derived from Phase 1 and Phase 2 of roadmap.md.

Phase 1: Finish and Stabilize v0.1

1. Lock the v0.1 scope

2. Harden the Shiny collection layer

Relevant files: - R/render_survey.R - inst/shiny/app.R

3. Complete timing analysis in quality_report()

Relevant file: - R/quality_report.R

4. Resolve weighted scoring behavior

Relevant files: - R/sf_scale.R - R/score_scales.R

5. Expand test coverage across workflows

Relevant files: - tests/testthat/test-core.R - tests/testthat.R

6. Keep package checks green

Relevant files: - .github/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml - .github/workflows/pkgdown.yaml - .github/workflows/test-coverage.yaml

7. Finish CRAN-readiness work

Current blockers outside the local source tree:

Latest verification:

Definition of done for Phase 1:

Phase 2: Package Adoption and Publication

1. Strengthen the getting-started path

Relevant files: - README.md - vignettes/surveyframe.Rmd - _pkgdown.yml

2. Improve the pkgdown site

3. Prepare the JSS paper

4. Turn the package into a citable methods contribution

Relevant file: - inst/CITATION

5. Publication support work

Relevant file: - CONTRIBUTING.md

Definition of done for Phase 2:

On this page

Developed by Mohammed Ali Sharafuddin. Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.

surveyframe is an open-source R package for survey research. MIT License.
